fomod.Name: Logitech G-series Wheel Mod
fomod.Author: Grant Perdue
fomod.Description: Cyberpunk 2077 support for Logitech G-series steering wheels (G25, G27, G29, G920, G923, Driving Force, Driving Force Pro, Driving Force GT, Momo Racing, WingMan Formula Force). Reads the wheel directly via DirectInput 8, injects inputs into the game's vehicle system via a RED4ext plugin, and drives game-generated force-feedback effects back to the wheel. Respects Logitech G HUB by default — sensitivity, rotation range, and centering spring remain G HUB's job unless you explicitly opt in to override.
